name: Adolescent Well-Care Visit Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for adolescent well-care visits and preventive medicine services for ages 12-21. Used in the adolescent well-care visit (AWC) measure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, adolescent (age 12-17 years)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, 18-39 years
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, adolescent (age 12-17 years)
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine evaluation, 18-39 years
Annual wellness visit; includes a health risk assessment, first visit
Annual wellness visit; includes a health risk assessment, subsequent visit
Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of a new patient (level 1)
Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of a new patient (level 2)
Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient (level 1)
Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient (level 2)
Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient (level 3)
